name: ARRI Alexa LF
description: Industry standard large-format digital cinema camera known for natural skin tones and organic rendering.

name: RED V-Raptor XL
description: High-speed 8K multi-format camera offering extreme resolution and superb dynamic range.

name: Sony Venice 2
description: Dual-native ISO sensor with beautiful color science, widely used in high-end feature films.

name: IMAX MSM 9802
description: High-fidelity 15-perf 70mm film camera, delivering unmatched scale and immense detail.

name: Panavision Millennium DXL2
description: Large-format camera integrated with legendary Panavision optics and RED Monstro sensor.

name: Bolex H16 (16mm Vintage)
description: Classic spring-wound 16mm movie camera, adding vintage charm, heavy grain, and hand-held character.

name: Super 35mm Film Camera
description: Standard film camera format, offering a nostalgic, cinematic texture with natural highlights roll-off.
